abilities.description:
When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Fire} by holding a foe at bay using your spear's reach or bracing it against a charging foe, roll +iron or +edge. If you score a hit, you may...

  • Iron: @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} if in control or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} now, and add +1.
  • Edge: Take +1 momentum.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} in close quarters, you may attempt to stack your spear (decide before rolling). If you do, mark progress twice on a hit. If the fight continues with the spear stacked, you may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.d9208f9b7d827aec]{React Under Fire} +iron to recover it.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} by charging into close quarters with a fixed spear, roll an extra challenge die and keep the two lowest. A weak hit then counts as a strong hit.
